summary: Clear‑sounding audience recording featuring a monster 30‑minute Scarlet > Fire jam
review: The audience tape is praised for its unusually clear instrument separation and vocal definition, with minimal boominess that often plagues crowd recordings. Musically the highlight is the epic over‑30‑minute Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain stretch, while tracks like Lazy River Road and Attics of My Life also receive commendation.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed positive review rates the show 4 stars, noting strong performance (especially the long Scarlet > Fire) and a high‑quality audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear notes and vocals, very little boominess for an audience source; overall clean mix compared to typical crowd recordings.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: Long, flowing second‑set jam (30+ min Scarlet > Fire) anchors the show; other songs are solid and well‑received.
